about.hero.title: Creative Designer & Developer
about.bio.title: Professional Bio
about.bio.text1: With over 8 years of experience in the design industry, I focus on creating intuitive user interfaces and robust front-end architectures. Passionate about minimalism, accessibility, and the intersection of visual art and performance code.
about.experience.label: analytics
about.experience.title: Work Experience
about.exp1.desc: Leading the design system initiative for Fortune 500 clients. Mentoring junior designers and collaborating with engineering teams to ensure pixel-perfect implementation of complex interactive features.
about.exp2.desc: Engineered responsive front-end components using React and Tailwind CSS. Reduced average page load time by 40% through code optimization and asset management strategies.
about.education.label: school
about.education.title: Education
about.edu.desc: Specialized in Human-Computer Interaction and User Psychology. Graduated with honors.
skills.hero.title: Skills & Technologies
skills.hero.desc: Designing and developing robust digital experiences with a modern tech stack. I bridge the gap between complex engineering and human-centered design.
skills.frontend.title: Frontend Development
skills.backend.title: Backend & Logic
skills.database.title: Database

skills.how.title: How I Work
skills.approach.1.title: Understand First
skills.approach.1.desc: I dive deep into the problem domain to ensure every line of code serves a business goal.
skills.approach.2.title: Architecture Matters
skills.approach.2.desc: Scalable, maintainable, and clean architecture is the foundation of every project I build.
skills.approach.3.title: Iterative by Nature
skills.approach.3.desc: Continuous feedback loops and rapid prototyping ensure the final product hits the mark.
skills.approach.4.title: Collaboration
skills.approach.4.desc: I work best as part of a team, sharing knowledge and bridging silos between departments.
skills.cta.title: Let's build something great together.
projects.hero.title: My Projects
projects.hero.desc: A curated selection of my professional work and personal experiments in the realm of full-stack development and UI design.
projects.cta.title: Want to collaborate?
projects.cta.desc: I'm currently available for freelance work and open-source collaborations. Let's build something amazing together.
projects.ai-analytics-dashboard.title: AI Analytics Dashboard
projects.ai-analytics-dashboard.desc: A real-time predictive analytics dashboard for SaaS platforms using OpenAI APIs and dynamic data streaming.
projects.ecommerce-engine.title: E-commerce Engine
projects.ecommerce-engine.desc: High-performance storefront with headless CMS integration, global state management, and Stripe payments.
projects.web3-wallet.title: Web3 Wallet Tracker
projects.web3-wallet.desc: Multi-chain portfolio visualizer with live pricing, transaction history, and NFT gallery integration.
projects.sentinel-security.title: Sentinel Security
projects.sentinel-security.desc: Infrastructure monitoring tool for cloud deployments with automated threat detection and alert systems.
projects.healthsync-pro.title: HealthSync Pro
projects.healthsync-pro.desc: A cross-platform health application integrating wearable data for holistic lifestyle coaching.
projects.nexus-editor.title: Nexus Code Editor
projects.nexus-editor.desc: Lightweight browser-based IDE with collaborative editing features and real-time compilation.
project.overview.title: Project Overview
project.overview.desc: A comprehensive redesign of a high-traffic analytics platform, focusing on user experience, performance optimization, and modern aesthetic principles. The challenge was to transform complex data sets into intuitive, actionable insights for enterprise-level decision makers.
project.features.title: Key Features
project.features.1.title: Real-time Data Streaming
project.features.1.desc: Integrated WebSocket architecture for sub-second data updates across all widgets.
project.features.2.title: Customizable Widget Engine
project.features.2.desc: Drag-and-drop interface allowing users to personalize their reporting view.
project.features.3.title: Advanced Filtering System
project.features.3.desc: Complex multi-parameter query builder with natural language processing capabilities.
project.tech.title: Technical Details
project.tech.quote: The main technical hurdle was managing state for thousands of concurrent data points. We implemented a custom Redux middleware and memoized React components to ensure 60FPS performance even during heavy data spikes.
experience.title: Experience
experience.desc: A journey of growth, learning, and crafting exceptional digital products over the past decade.
experience.1.desc: Leading the design system initiative for Fortune 500 clients. Specialized in rapid prototyping and high-fidelity mockups.
experience.2.desc: Engineered responsive front-end components using React and Tailwind CSS. Reduced average page load time by 40%.
experience.3.desc: Built progressive web applications and optimized legacy monolithic dashboards into React SPAs.
experience.4.desc: Maintained enterprise CMS installations and custom WordPress plugin development.
